title: Kai of Lag Village
overview: Kai's destiny changes when he reproduces an ability that he saw in a strange dream.

title: Lady Jose
overview: Kai travels to Eda Village with Lady Jose, who teaches him about the duty of guardian bearers.

title: Arbitration God
overview: Kai returns to the valley where his journey started, where he learns more about the valley god.

title: A Small Paradise
overview: Kai's accomplishments attract the attention of Vezin, and Kai recalls a childhood memory.

title: The Priest and the Inspector
overview: An inspector from the central plain visits Rag Village, and Kai escorts a priest following an org band.

title: Rigdaros
overview: Kai battles Adurakan, a powerful org guardian bearer, in order to protect the valley.

title: Truthseeker
overview: The scouting party returns to Rag Village only to learn it was devastated by an attack during their absence.

title: To Ispi Rio
overview: Kai and Nada fight for their lives while Lag Village defends itself from another macaque attack.

title: The Power of God
overview: Macaques come flooding through the gate opened by the inspector. Will Kai arrive in time to save Lag Village?

title: The Great God Kanae
overview: The macaques ask Kai to save them from the evil Great God Kanae.

title: Diabo
overview: Kai and his allies confront the diabo, but it is not easily defeated.

title: Protector of Kanae
overview: Kai's life is slowly drained away after being swallowed by the diabo when he hears a voice...
